extra.reason: Completed initial haxified Rust contract docs, linked profile docs, non-goals, capability map, and tracker sweep.

Added docs/metal-capability-fixtures.md with contract-first positive/negative fixture matrix, existing evidence, missing first-wave fixtures, harness owners, failure policy, and Beads mapping; linked it from the roadmap and docs index.

Added docs/metal-type-surface-gap-matrix.md with supported/partial/missing audit for rust.*, reflaxe.std, and hxrt/native type surfaces; linked it from the roadmap, docs index, and fixture plan; mapped priority gaps and follow-up Beads.

Implemented SurfaceContractRegistry and contract_report schema v5 with consumedSurfaces/nativeRepresentationPlan; guard now verifies deterministic Option/Result facade report entries. Residual Oracle follow-ups remain in sibling beads.

Implemented RuntimeRequirementAnalyzer with stable semantic reason taxonomy; runtime_plan schema v4 now emits deterministic runtimeRequirements and fallbackSummary with module/define attribution; metal policy guard verifies portable semantic reasons and no-hxrt non-blocking summary.

Added portable facade Option/Result Rust-output and contract-report fixtures, added Dynamic runtime fallback reason fixture coverage, documented that this first wave covers admitted reflaxe.std facades rather than blanket upstream Haxe stdlib native lowering, and verified snapshots plus full metal-policy/docs/path guards.
Implemented NoHxrtEligibilityAnalyzer source/typed-AST gate, documented the split from NoHxrtPass, added no-hxrt semantic negative fixtures, and verified through full metal policy harness.
Added codex-hxrust periodic QA command and weekly evidence job, documented the gate, and verified local portable+metal generated Cargo checks/tests pass.
Added portable facade Option/Result output-shape gate in metal policy, documented the enforcement, and verified full metal policy plus codex-hxrust generated Cargo QA.
Documented that portable Vec lowering is deferred until an admitted collection facade exists, and clarified Array/rust.Vec/future reflaxe.std collection boundaries.
Typed native surface usage report and enforcement implemented with schema v6 fixtures/docs and final policy/Codex QA passing.
Capability-driven portable facade design closed after Oracle changes landed, all child tasks closed, and policy/Codex QA passing.
Typed mini-DSL authority documented and enforced with scoped rust.metal.Code policy, negative fixtures, metal-policy harness coverage, snapshot validation, docs guards, and Codex hxrust QA passing.
Trait/impl/bound model documented and backed by metal snapshots for @:rustImpl + generic bounds + bounded extern helper and Haxe interface trait-object boundaries, with policy/docs/Codex QA passing.

Closed after Oracle APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES follow-up pass. Scoped callback borrow-region model remains approved for M42. Closure changes tightened direct-token literal handling, added rust.Str spawn-boundary enforcement, expanded escape-shape fixtures, documented README/FAQ/docs surfaces, and created typed-pass/output-shape/RAII follow-up Beads. Validation passed: full metal policy, focused borrow/slice snapshots, docs checks, local-path/defines guards, and diff check.

Published extern/lifetime-island cookbook and added metal_extern_lifetime_island snapshot proving a typed Haxe facade over a Rust module with lifetime/HRTB internals. Linked README/FAQ/docs surfaces and updated M42 evidence tables. Validation passed for the new snapshot and docs/guard checks.

Implemented typed borrow-region alias/storage analysis with contract-first fixtures, docs/evidence updates, and validation gates. Remaining wrapper/helper/throw, unknown closure variable, and overlapping mutable-region work stays in follow-up beads.

Implemented local same-source overlapping mutable borrow diagnostics with contract-first negative/positive fixtures, docs/evidence updates, and validation gates. Richer source provenance remains follow-up work.
Wrapper/helper/object/throw borrow-token escape fixtures and typed-pass diagnostics implemented; docs and policy evidence updated.

All 74 roadmap child milestones are complete; final M42 closeout and validation evidence recorded.
Fixed optional primitive constructor default lowering for portable and metal; regression snapshot and validation recorded.
Fixed emitted class-reference field defaults to use null HxRef handles; regression snapshot and docs recorded.

Required anonymous functionNumber:Int record reads are covered by test/snapshot/anon_required_field_types and current codex-hxrust HXCX-4.122 harness passes; optional omitted fields remain haxe.rust-i8li.

Closed with compiler-only Reflect.compare lowering for typed Int/Float/String, a sort-comparator snapshot, docs/FAQ/README updates, regenerated semantic confidence evidence, and focused/app validation passing.
Closed with compiler-only nullable Array.shift/class-reference return lowering, product-neutral snapshot coverage, docs updates, regenerated semantic evidence, and focused/app validations passing.
Closed as current compiler behavior already inserts needed clones; added product-neutral string conditional reuse regression snapshot and refreshed generated evidence.
Closed with String class-field += lowering, product-neutral snapshot coverage, operator/v1 docs updates, and focused/app validations passing.
Implemented compile-time generic helper payload-bound propagation and regression coverage.
Implemented Haxe String.substring Rust lowering and regression coverage.
Stabilized weekly HXRT bytes runtime gate policy and cleanup coverage with focused validation passing.
Completed M43 systems-facade audit, chose file/path first slice, updated public/internal docs and AGENTS guardrail, and validated docs guards.
Added contract-first native file/path positive fixture and raw-escape negative fixture, captured pre-implementation failure, and validated the fixtures through the metal policy gate.
Implemented rust.fs.NativeFiles with didactic HaxeDoc, a narrow direct std::fs Rust helper, and passing contract fixtures.
Added deterministic native-file no-hxrt output-shape gate and raw-escape negative policy coverage, with full metal policy validation passing.
Refreshed systems-facade docs, README/FAQ/index links, AGENTS policy, and app-level evidence for the native file/path facade.
Closed M43 with a typed rust.fs.NativeFiles facade, no-hxrt/native output-shape gate, docs/FAQ/README/AGENTS sync, and passing focused plus app-level validation.
Closed M44 process-facade audit with a documented owned-command/no-hxrt first-slice contract, fixture strategy, second-pass review, and README/docs/FAQ/AGENTS sync.
Closed contract-first process fixtures: positive missing-facade contract captured, raw std::process escape negative wired into metal policy, and focused/full policy validation passed.
Implemented rust.process.NativeCommands with a narrow direct std::process helper and passing focused no-hxrt process fixtures.
Closed native process no-hxrt/output-shape gate with full metal policy validation passing.
Refreshed process facade docs/FAQ/README/AGENTS, recorded app-level evidence, and validated docs, policy, idiom, and codex-hxrust gates.
Closed M44 with rust.process.NativeCommands, no-hxrt process fixtures/output-shape gate, docs/FAQ/README/AGENTS sync, second-pass review, and passing focused plus app-level validation.
